name: automation-os-worker
description: AutomationOS IEE worker — Integrated Execution Environment runner. Spec: docs/iee-development-spec.md. Runtime dependencies (drizzle-orm, postgres, pg-boss, playwright, zod) and dev tooling (typescript, tsx, @types/node) are intentionally NOT declared here — they are resolved from the repo root /repo/node_modules to avoid duplicate package installs that cause TypeScript type-identity conflicts during the Docker build.
